entity.label: Jaddua
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The last high priest mentioned in the Old Testament (Neh. 12:11, 22), sons of Jonathan.

nodes.label: Jaddua
nodes.description: The last high priest mentioned in the Old Testament (Neh. 12:11, 22), sons of Jonathan.

verses.text: And Joiada begat Jonathan, and Jonathan begat Jaddua.
The Levites in the days of Eliashib, Joiada, and Johanan, and Jaddua, were recorded chief of the fathers: also the priests, to the reign of Darius the Persian.
